task: Task-Reference Rooms for Theorems Harness Coordination

items.title: Add TaskRef resolver
items.acceptance: Given tenant, repo, spec, and branch metadata, both Codex and Claude resolve the same task_ref_id and canonical_room_id.

items.title: Add room refs, aliases, and merges
items.acceptance: A message written to room:ungrouped with SPEC-9 metadata appears in the SPEC-9 canonical room as a related event with provenance.

items.title: Restore explicit pings
items.acceptance: urgency=ask or urgency=block creates a target actor ping with pending, seen, and consumed status, even if the actor is not subscribed to the stream.

items.title: Add turn-start discovery
items.acceptance: At turn start, a head sees canonical room, related inbox messages, open pings, active intents, stale intents, and contradictions for its task.

items.title: Write and read coordination manifest
items.acceptance: Starting a task writes a manifest; a later head in the worktree can find the canonical room without guessing.

items.title: Target checkout identity
items.acceptance: A ping can target actor plus branch plus worktree; a different checkout sees that it is not the intended target.

items.title: Add contradiction claim model
items.acceptance: Structured claim conflicts write CONTRADICTS edges and a room-visible contradiction event.

items.title: Add room dashboard digest
items.acceptance: Digest displays canonical room, aliases, active actors, stale actors, pending pings, related ungrouped messages, and contradictions.

items.title: Backfill compatibility
items.acceptance: Existing room users keep working; old room ids become aliases or standalone rooms with no data loss.

items.title: Acceptance replay
items.acceptance: A replay of the SPEC-9 failure mode shows Claude's ungrouped handoff discovered by Codex before edits begin.
